title: methods fixture tests: no request body verification
description: All 12 server-backed tests in methods_test.rs match on method(POST) only; none verify the outgoing JSON request body. Regressions in method name, accountId field, filter keys (chatId, hasMention, kind, muted), sort array, create/update payload keys, and sinceState would all go undetected. The tests verify deserialization correctness but not request construction. Consequence: a change that silently sends the wrong accountId or drops a required field passes the full test suite. Fix: add at minimum one body_json matcher per method group (chat, message, misc, contact) using wiremock's body_json matcher or body_partial_json if available, checking the JMAP method call shape.
